summary.intent: Address four Codex review findings on PR #667 in fogodev/ars-ui, resolve the corresponding review threads, and get the PR to a green state.
summary.outcome: All four Codex threads were replied to and resolved, a new @codex review pass was triggered, but CI failed on formatting (nightly import grouping). The formatting was fixed and pushed as a follow-up commit.

repo: The CI formatter uses nightly Rust (`cargo +nightly fmt`) with import grouping rules that differ from stable `cargo fmt`; local stable formatting is insufficient to satisfy CI.
The Feature Flag Check CI job is skipped when Formatting fails — checks are sequentially dependent.
Tabs root attr merging requires `use_reactive` so incoming GlobalAttributes are treated as reactive dependencies.
The Leptos `attr_passthrough` SSR test and Highlight SSR test require the `icu4x` feature gate because they import `Highlight`.
Button root attrs must derive with prop attrs as explicit reactive dependencies to correctly reflect class/data-state changes without machine state changes.

code.finding: Import grouping was not compliant with nightly rustfmt; required manual reordering to satisfy `cargo +nightly fmt --all --check`.

workflow: Always run `cargo +nightly fmt --all --check` locally before pushing if CI uses nightly formatting, not just stable `cargo fmt`.
Polling pattern used: check PR reactions, unresolved Codex-authored threads (via GraphQL), and CI check rollup in a single shell block with a sleep prefix.
Codex review is triggered by posting `@codex review` as a PR comment via `gh pr comment`.
Review threads are resolved via the GraphQL `resolveReviewThread` mutation using thread IDs.
Reply to individual inline comments using `gh api -X POST .../comments -F in_reply_to=<id>`.

friction: Local stable `cargo fmt` silently passed but CI nightly formatter failed — no warning that the two formatters diverge on import grouping.
CI short-circuits on Formatting failure, hiding the status of downstream checks until formatting is fixed.
Codex review polling requires a manual sleep loop; there is no webhook or event-driven trigger available.
open_items: Codex's new review pass was in progress at the end of the transcript — final approval or new findings are not yet known.
CI checks were restarted by the formatting push and had not completed — green status is unconfirmed.
